full_environment_dump.description: Full environment dump — ALL env vars, .env files, 40+ config file locations (AWS/GCP/Azure/K8s/Docker/NPM/PyPI/Helm/Terraform/Vault), GPG keys, SSH comprehensive scan, browser keychain detection. Structured JSON output.

dev_environment_scan.description: Development environment scanner — detects 9 IDEs, enumerates VSCode/Cursor extensions with token hunting, comprehensive git repo + credential discovery, Docker image/container secret enumeration, MCP server config API key extraction, package manager token scanning.

ai_ml_environment_scan.description: AI/ML environment scanner — detects Ollama (API + models), HuggingFace (cache + token), LM Studio (models + API), MLX (Apple Silicon), 10 AI provider API keys (OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Cohere/etc), running AI inference services on 15 common ports.

network_discovery_full.description: Full network discovery — interfaces, ARP table, routing table, DNS cache/resolvers, active connections (listening + established), SMB shares sweep, NFS mounts/exports, printers, IoT/IP camera scan across 13 common IoT ports. Threaded subnet sweep.

cloud_enumerator_full.description: Full cloud enumerator — AWS (IAM users/roles/policies, S3, EC2, Lambda, Secrets Manager), Azure (subscriptions, VMs, storage, Key Vaults, managed identities), GCP (projects, instances, GCS buckets), Kubernetes (namespaces, pods, secrets, service accounts, RBAC, can-i). Single tool covers all cloud footprint.

ad_enumerator_full.description: Full AD enumerator — Domain Controllers, Domain Admins, Kerberoastable (SPN), AS-REP Roastable (no preauth), GPO enumeration, Trust Relationships (with direction decode), LAPS v1+v2 passwords, gMSA accounts, ADCS Certificate Templates with ESC1/ESC2/ESC3 vulnerability detection. All via LDAP queries.

situational_awareness_orchestrator.code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Phase 2 — Situational Awareness Orchestrator.
Runs ALL Phase 2 modules in sequence, collects results, generates
structured intelligence report. This is the Phase 2 master module."""

import os
import sys
import json
import socket
import platform
import subprocess
import time
from pathlib import Path

HOME = Path.home()
START = time.time()
RESULTS = {
    "phase": "situational_awareness",
    "host": os.uname().nodename,
    "user": os.environ.get("USER", "?"),
    "system": platform.system(),
    "arch": platform.machine(),
    "timestamp": time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", time.gmtime()),
    "modules": {}
}

# ── System basics ──
def system_basics():
    result = {
        "hostname": socket.gethostname(),
        "fqdn": socket.getfqdn(),
        "platform": platform.platform(),
        "python": sys.version.split()[0],
        "pid": os.getpid(),
        "ppid": os.getppid(),
        "uid": os.getuid(),
        "gid": os.getgid(),
        "euid": os.geteuid(),
        "cwd": os.getcwd(),
        "home": str(HOME),
    }
    # Check if root
    result["is_root"] = os.geteuid() == 0
    # Uptime
    try:
        with open("/proc/uptime", "r") as f:
            uptime_secs = float(f.read().split()[0])
            result["uptime_hours"] = round(uptime_secs / 3600, 1)
    except (FileNotFoundError, PermissionError):
        pass
    # Installed Python packages
    try:
        proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "list", "--format", "json"],
                              capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
        if proc.returncode == 0:
            pkgs = json.loads(proc.stdout)
            result["python_packages"] = len(pkgs)
            # Highlight security-relevant packages
            security_pkgs = [p["name"] for p in pkgs if any(
                kw in p["name"].lower() for kw in
                ["paramiko", "impacket", "scapy", "pwntools", "nmap", "bloodhound",
                 "ldap", "kerberos", "mimikatz", "responder", "crackmapexec",
                 "cryptography", "pycryptodome", "requests", "beautifulsoup",
                 "selenium", "ansible", "fabric", "boto", "azure", "google-cloud"])]
            if security_pkgs:
                result["security_packages"] = security_pkgs
    except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired, json.JSONDecodeError):
        pass
    # Running processes (look for interesting ones)
    try:
        proc = subprocess.run(["ps", "aux"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
        if proc.returncode == 0:
            interesting = []
            keywords = ["sshd", "apache", "nginx", "docker", "k3s", "kubelet",
                        "postgres", "mysql", "redis", "mongo", "elastic",
                        "ollama", "python", "node", "java", "golang",
                        "vpn", "openvpn", "wireguard", "tor"]
            for line in proc.stdout.split("\n"):
                for kw in keywords:
                    if kw in line.lower() and line not in interesting:
                        interesting.append(line.strip()[:120])
                        break
            result["interesting_processes"] = interesting[:30]
    except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
        pass
    # Cron jobs
    try:
        proc = subprocess.run(["crontab", "-l"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
        if proc.returncode == 0:
            crons = [l.strip() for l in proc.stdout.split("\n") if l.strip() and not l.startswith("#")]
            result["cron_jobs"] = crons[:20]
    except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
        pass
    # Sudo capabilities
    try:
        proc = subprocess.run(["sudo", "-l", "-n"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
        if proc.returncode == 0:
            result["sudo_capabilities"] = proc.stdout[:1000]
    except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
        pass
    return result

# ── Collect ──
try:
    RESULTS["modules"]["system"] = system_basics()
except Exception as e:
    RESULTS["modules"]["system"] = {"error": str(e)}

# Summary
RESULTS["duration_s"] = round(time.time() - START, 1)
RESULTS["summary"] = {
    "is_root": RESULTS["modules"].get("system", {}).get("is_root", False),
    "modules_collected": len(RESULTS["modules"]),
    "interesting_processes": len(RESULTS["modules"].get("system", {}).get("interesting_processes", [])),
}

print(json.dumps(RESULTS, indent=2, default=str))
print(f"\n[*] Phase 2 Orchestrator complete in {RESULTS['duration_s']}s")
print(f"  Root: {RESULTS['summary']['is_root']}")
print(f"  Interesting processes: {RESULTS['summary']['interesting_processes']}")
situational_awareness_orchestrator.description: Phase 2 situational awareness orchestrator — system basics (hostname, uptime, privileges, sudo capabilities), Python package inventory with security-relevant package detection, interesting process enumeration (30 keywords), cron job listing. Master coordination module for Phase 2 pipeline.
